name: lazytax
description: Private, evidence-first Indian tax verification with deterministic local tools.

interface.shortDescription: Verify an Indian tax return with source-linked evidence.
interface.longDescription: LazyTax turns Codex into an evidence-first Indian tax verification workspace. It supports a synthetic judge sandbox and an explicitly authorized private-document mode, masks identifiers in tool outputs, reconciles source records, delegates supported numeric results to deterministic local tools, and generates a Tax Proof Pack without filing anything.
defaultPrompt: Privately verify these tax documents, mask identifiers, and show every discrepancy.
Run the bundled synthetic judge workflow without guessing through conflicts.
Compare both tax regimes and cite the evidence for every number.
Generate a Tax Proof Pack after I approve all resolutions.
